nodes.label: Archivos en desuso/ (legacy, gitignored)
nodes.rationale: Holds legacy material (old static site 'web/', local SQLite backend server.js/data/, and the ELIJA agent layer: docs/knowledge/skills/scripts/inbox/templates) intentionally excluded from version control and deployment.

nodes.label: No-flash theme init script (Santiago timezone based)
nodes.rationale: Sets data-theme before first paint to avoid a flash of wrong theme: respects manual localStorage choice (ps_theme_manual/ps_theme); otherwise derives light/dark from the current hour in America/Santiago timezone (light 07:00-19:00, dark otherwise). theme-color meta and root background are set synchronously to prevent iOS status bar color mismatch.
nodes.norm_label: no-flash theme init script (santiago timezone based)

nodes.label: apple-touch-icon PNG 180 rationale
nodes.rationale: iOS does not use SVG for the home-screen icon, so a PNG 180 is required specifically for 'Add to Home Screen', separate from the SVG/PNG192 favicon.

nodes.label: theme-color meta dynamic sync rationale
nodes.rationale: theme-color is synced by JS to data-theme rather than to prefers-color-scheme, because the actual displayed theme is decided by the manual toggle or Santiago local time, not the OS color scheme preference — otherwise iOS could paint status/nav bars with the wrong color relative to what's on screen.

nodes.label: format-detection=telephone=no meta rationale
nodes.rationale: Prevents iOS from auto-detecting phone numbers and styling them (which produces a black box artifact in light mode).

nodes.label: Hero image LCP preload (bruno-hero.jpg)
nodes.rationale: Preloads the hero image with fetchpriority=high because it is the landing page's Largest Contentful Paint element, speeding up first paint.

nodes.label: BrunettiCutz iOS app (SwiftUI, native)
nodes.rationale: Built as a native SwiftUI app rather than a WebView wrapper so it can consume the project's REST APIs directly over HTTP, while retaining demo-data fallback so the UI stays navigable when the backend has no signed session or missing env vars.

nodes.label: Native iOS features (dashboard, agenda, clients, workshop, settings)
nodes.norm_label: native ios features (dashboard, agenda, clients, workshop, settings)

nodes.label: Liquid Glass with fallback for older systems
nodes.rationale: Provides a graceful visual fallback so the app still renders correctly on systems that predate the Liquid Glass design language.
nodes.norm_label: liquid glass with fallback for older systems
